title: The Steric Demand
description: The golem has been tested with 4 ingredients. Deduce the reaction pattern and identify the target group.

hints.text:
The golem reacts to SIZE on a specific color channel.
Known tests:
  ing6: chest=✓ ears=✓  →  animators
  ing3: chest=✓ ears=✗  →  chest_only
  ing1: chest=✓ ears=✓  →  animators
  ing2: chest=✗ ears=✗  →  non_reactive

Chest reacts to B+S. Ears react to G+S. Animation rule: Large reaction → '+', Small reaction → '−'. So animation ingredients must have B− AND G−. Cross-reference with the mixing clues to identify those ingredients.
The animators are: ingredients [2, 3]. Alch: ing2→NNN, ing3→pNn.
